title: Crisis Communication
description: Acknowledge, commit, update, learn — the four moves of credible crisis response.
summary_pt_br: Crise: reconhecer, comprometer, atualizar, aprender. Sem voz passiva que esconde responsabilidade.

scenes.subtitle_en: Acknowledge, commit, update, learn — the four moves of credible crisis response.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Crise: reconhecer, comprometer, atualizar, aprender. Sem voz passiva que esconde responsabilidade.

scenes.text_en: Acknowledge, commit, update, learn — the four moves of credible crisis response. Focus: crisis communication. We acknowledge the error and its impact on our customers.
scenes.text_pt: Crise: reconhecer, comprometer, atualizar, aprender. Sem voz passiva que esconde responsabilidade. Foco: crisis communication. Reconhecemos o erro e seu impacto nos clientes.

scenes.title: Crisis Communication
scenes.body_en: Four moves: ACKNOWLEDGE without minimizing. COMMIT to specific action with timeline. UPDATE frequently. LEARN publicly. Avoid passive voice that hides agency.
scenes.body_pt: Crise: reconhecer, comprometer, atualizar, aprender. Sem voz passiva que esconde responsabilidade.

examples.en: We acknowledge the error and its impact on our customers.
examples.pt: Reconhecemos o erro e seu impacto nos clientes.

examples.en: By Friday, every affected account will receive a personal message.
examples.pt: Até sexta, toda conta afetada receberá mensagem pessoal.

examples.en: We will publish a full post-mortem within seven days.

exercise.question: Complete: "We ___ the error and its impact on our customers."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "We acknowledge the error and its impact on our customers."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Reconhecemos o erro e seu impacto nos clientes.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: By Friday, every affected account will receive a personal message.
I haven't heard anything about that.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "By Friday, every affected account will receive a personal message."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Até sexta, toda conta afetada receberá mensagem pessoal.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Crisis Communication — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre crisis communication. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Joca, a data breach just happened. Open the statement.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: We acknowledge the breach and its impact.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What specific commitment do you make?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Every affected user gets a personal message by Friday.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Daily updates on a public status page.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Two new controls will prevent recurrence.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Crisis well-handled builds more trust than smooth quarters.

scenes.title: The 9 AM statement
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe the four crisis moves. Use at least three crisis-communication terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: At nine in the morning after a serious breach, Joca gathered his team to draft the most important statement of his career.

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: We acknowledge the data breach and its direct impact on eleven thousand customer accounts this weekend.

paragraphs.speaker: Lawyer
paragraphs.en: Avoid passive voice — 'an error occurred' hides accountability and readers notice every single time.

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: By Friday, every affected account will receive a personal message with the exact data that was exposed.

paragraphs.speaker: Communications
paragraphs.en: Daily updates on a public status page, and a full post-mortem within seven business days minimum.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Crisis handled well, Joca had learned, builds deeper trust than any quarter of smooth quarterly updates ever could.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Crisis Communication". Acknowledge, commit, update, learn — the four moves of credible crisis response. We acknowledge the error and its impact on our customers. By Friday, every affected account will receive a personal message. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Crisis Communication". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.

sources.label: Aeon Essays
sources.pt_hint: Ensaios longos de filosofia, ciência e cultura.

sources.label: Project Gutenberg
sources.pt_hint: Clássicos da literatura em domínio público.

sources.label: London Review of Books
sources.pt_hint: Crítica literária e ensaios — prosa densa, C2+.
